source.description: A reviewed six-panel graphite-and-colored-pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent pear-shaped locking climbing carabiner tilted slightly right with one blue rope threaded through its lower basket and arranged as exactly two loose coils; no hand, climber, cliff, harness, knot, lettering, logo, decorative border, or extra hardware.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one pear-shaped frame, inner opening, gate axis, hinge and nose reserves, screw-lock sleeve footprint, continuous rope path, two loose coil paths, and shadow zone; builds the carabiner around those guides; thickens the same rope path; adds the hardware, rope ridges, reflections, and shadow; then shades and colors only those established forms before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: pear-shaped frame guide, inner opening, gate axis, hinge and nose reserves, screw-lock sleeve footprint, continuous rope path, two loose coil paths, and shadow zone
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one locking carabiner, its open negative space, and one continuous rope route through the lower basket into two loose coils.

final_elements.name: locking carabiner silhouette with thick pear-shaped frame, open center, straight gate, rounded basket, and narrow spine
final_elements.description: A confident contour turns the frame guide into one readable tilted carabiner while keeping the hardware reserves clear.

final_elements.name: gate hinge, hooked nose, ribbed screw-lock sleeve with grooves, continuous rope thickness, exactly two loose rope coils, and directional twist ridges
final_elements.description: The locking mechanism and one unbroken textured rope become visible without hiding finished detail beneath the crossing rope.

final_elements.name: three metal reflection lines, graphite form shading, and shallow cast shadow
final_elements.description: A few long metal highlights, soft graphite turns, and one shadow clarify the already established materials.

final_elements.name: graphite depth with restrained blue rope, cool-gray metal, and muted brass sleeve color
final_elements.description: Soft graphite and restrained colored pencil separate the established rope, frame, gate, sleeve, and shadow while preserving paper highlights.

frames.visible_job: Places the pear-shaped frame, inner opening, gate axis, hinge and nose reserves, screw-lock sleeve footprint, one continuous rope path, exactly two loose coil paths, and a shadow zone.
introduces: pear-shaped frame guide, inner opening, gate axis, hinge and nose reserves, screw-lock sleeve footprint, continuous rope path, two loose coil paths, and shadow zone

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the thick pear-shaped frame, open center, straight gate, rounded basket, and narrow spine while preserving the same tilt.
introduces: locking carabiner silhouette with thick pear-shaped frame, open center, straight gate, rounded basket, and narrow spine
requires_prior_elements: pear-shaped frame guide, inner opening, gate axis, hinge and nose reserves, screw-lock sleeve footprint, continuous rope path, two loose coil paths, and shadow zone

frames.visible_job: Adds the gate hinge, hooked nose, ribbed screw-lock sleeve and grooves, then gives the reserved rope path one consistent thickness, directional twist ridges, and exactly two loose coils.
introduces: gate hinge, hooked nose, ribbed screw-lock sleeve with grooves, continuous rope thickness, exactly two loose rope coils, and directional twist ridges
requires_prior_elements: locking carabiner silhouette with thick pear-shaped frame, open center, straight gate, rounded basket, and narrow spine

frames.visible_job: Adds exactly three long metal reflection lines, soft graphite form shading around the established frame and sleeve, and one shallow cast shadow.
introduces: three metal reflection lines, graphite form shading, and shallow cast shadow
requires_prior_elements: locking carabiner silhouette with thick pear-shaped frame, open center, straight gate, rounded basket, and narrow spine
gate hinge, hooked nose, ribbed screw-lock sleeve with grooves, continuous rope thickness, exactly two loose rope coils, and directional twist ridges

frames.visible_job: Adds graphite depth, restrained blue pencil to the rope, cool gray to the established frame and gate, and muted brass to the screw-lock sleeve.
introduces: graphite depth with restrained blue rope, cool-gray metal, and muted brass sleeve color
requires_prior_elements: locking carabiner silhouette with thick pear-shaped frame, open center, straight gate, rounded basket, and narrow spine
gate hinge, hooked nose, ribbed screw-lock sleeve with grooves, continuous rope thickness, exactly two loose rope coils, and directional twist ridges
three metal reflection lines, graphite form shading, and shallow cast shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established carabiner frame, gate hardware, continuous two-coil rope, ridges, reflections, sleeve grooves, restrained color, paper highlights, and shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight clarification on established rope and metal

rejection_checks: No frame, gate, hinge, nose, sleeve, rope segment, coil, ridge, reflection, groove, color area, highlight, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The carabiner and continuous rope must retain one tilt, frame width, gate position, crossing order, two-coil route, scale, and crop across all six panels.
Reserve the rope crossing and screw-sleeve footprints from step one; do not render finished frame detail beneath those covering forms.
Reject hands, climbers, cliffs, harnesses, knots, lettering, logos, extra carabiners, extra rope coils, or decorative borders.
The finish must read as an attainable graphite-and-colored-pencil gear sketch with visible paper and hand pressure, not glossy product art or a vector safety icon.
